name: Mike Thompson
subject: Let us know your top priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

In just over a month, Joe Biden will be sworn in as the 46th President of the United States, and with his help, I know we will continue to progress as a Nation. However, we still have a lot to do. I want to hear directly from you on what your top issues are and what you think this new administration should prioritize.

**Will you take a moment to fill out our Priorities Survey as we come into the new year? Come January 20th, we are going to hit the ground running!**
**[Take Our Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/22211970/263638515/857096662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTA3YzVkMC01OTM2LWViMTEtOWZiNC0wMDE1NWQ0M2IyY2QiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q_Drq78sYPdhd8Ra6UZ9nOFsUXv9SyvDN3BmiiYIFG0=&emci=de54d000-5936-eb11-9fb4-00155d43b2cd&emdi=0507c5d0-5936-eb11-9fb4-00155d43b2cd&ceid=2678920)**
My colleagues and I are excited to begin our work with President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris. There has never been a more important time for us to course-correct our politics, and the secret ingredient to making that lasting change is [**_adding your voice._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/22211971/263638516/857096662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTA3YzVkMC01OTM2LWViMTEtOWZiNC0wMDE1NWQ0M2IyY2QiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q_Drq78sYPdhd8Ra6UZ9nOFsUXv9SyvDN3BmiiYIFG0=&emci=de54d000-5936-eb11-9fb4-00155d43b2cd&emdi=0507c5d0-5936-eb11-9fb4-00155d43b2cd&ceid=2678920)

Thank you for your continued support,

Mike Thompson

clean_body: Hey Peter, I just got off a call with the team. We're concerned, and EVERY conservative should be. With the North Carolina and Alaska U.S. Senate races settled, our nation’s future now hinges on what happens in two January 5th runoff elections in Georgia... And we know that the Democrats and leftist groups are planning to spend AT LEAST $100 MILLION to win these seats and seize complete control in Washington! Today, we’re launching our KEEP GEORGIA RED FUND to hold the line and save the Senate. You know just how hard we worked to Keep Texas Red this year. The Democrats came after the Lone Star State like never before, yet we prevailed. We have a key role to play now as Georgia becomes the national battleground. This is it, Peter. If Joe Biden prevails in the presidential race, the outcome in these two runoff elections will determine whether we can stop the worst of the Democrats’ extreme-left agenda, or whether they’ll be able to roll right over us. They’d LOVE to pack the U.S. Supreme Court , ban fossil fuels , and on and on! Please don’t wait. These elections are just weeks away. You know the Democrats and wealthy leftist donors are ALL-IN to seize complete control in Washington. For Liberty, Ted Cruz Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, ${Gears.unsubscribe\(\}) to unsubscribe. id:2020-11-11-22:36:23:819t Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

subject: Our fellow patriots in Georgia need help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
If Republicans don’t win the Senate runoffs in Georgia, the radical left will have TOTAL control. >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470054?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-rs-e-loeffler-support-120420?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_rs_e_loeffler_support_120420&mc_cid=c95a6b93aa&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t

Hoosier Republican,

Our Senate majority hangs in the balance, and it all comes down to Georgia.

In case you haven’t heard, both of Georgia’s U.S. Senate seats are headed for runoffs in January, and if we lose them and the presidency, then we lose the last critical line of defense in Washington against the Democrats and their radical agenda.

Kelly Loeffler is a tried-and-true conservative with a business background. She has been a strong ally to President Trump, and has consistently upheld conservative values while serving in the Senate.

Please donate what you can right now to help Kelly win this CRITICAL race. Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer have directed millions of dollars to Georgia to try and win this seat. And as Republicans, for the good of our nation this is when it’s most important for Hoosiers to step up and fight back.
CHIP IN FOR KELLY LOEFFLER NOW! (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-rs-e-loeffler-support-120420?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_rs_e_loeffler_support_120420&mc_cid=c95a6b93aa&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Here in Indiana, we won across the board. But if Republicans lose the U.S. Senate and the presidency, then key priorities for Indiana – and our nation – are in jeopardy.

You know what’s coming. They have already said they will pack the courts, impose the Green New Deal, implement gun control, and more.

This is our moment to stand for liberty and freedom for all. Please help Kelly Loeffler WIN on January 5th!

Thanks for your support,
Kyle Hupfer

name: Jim Oberweis
subject: Every legal vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim 2020 Committee
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/f9f83f21767d4c0f/4e46c58f7a70cbb7c3d6b838967d376c/34533) Peter, Yesterday afternoon my campaign formally initiated the process to begin a discovery recount. We are seeking a discovery recount in each of the seven counties within the 14th Congressional District.
As I have promised you since day one, we are fighting hard to make sure that every legal vote is counted in this critical race – but we can’t do it without your help. [Can I count on your continued support in this race?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/f9f83f21767d4c0f/1783ef12b95d5016c3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Fund 1 Hour Of Recount Work**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/f9f83f21767d4c0f/2130dce8488af2cbc3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Fund Half A Day Of Recount Work**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/f9f83f21767d4c0f/c720fb997aca8041c3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Fund 1 Full Day Of Recount Work**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/f9f83f21767d4c0f/0aaa125c76b4e9e2c3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Fund 1 Hour Of Attorney Fees**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/f9f83f21767d4c0f/b75dabf8f5dbaf34c3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Add your best possible contribution**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/f9f83f21767d4c0f/72b43659f824cd5ac3d6b838967d376c/34533) Remember: A discovery recount does not change a single vote, but it does allow us to see if the outcome might change with a full recount.
Election law provides campaigns the ability to request a discovery recount in close elections. As we have said for the last few weeks, we would be seeking a discovery recount and the first of these recounts have been formally filed in DuPage County. We will be filing paperwork in the other counties in the coming days.
[Will you chip in $10 or more right now to help our discovery recount efforts?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/f9f83f21767d4c0f/31dec137593f5cbfc3d6b838967d376c/34533)
For the win,
Jim Oberweis | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/f9f83f21767d4c0f/f8cb436c7571412ac3d6b838967d376c/34533)

name: Team Claudia
subject: re: 55 uncounted ballots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
with 55 uncounted ballots being added into the mix and our lead being contested in court, this fight is far from over Friend, Have you heard the latest breaking news on our fight to take back NY-22? The official count still shows Claudia with a 12 vote lead –– but a county in NY-22 just found **55 uncounted ballots** (11 of which were submitted by non-registered voters)- a MONTH after Election Day! This fight is far from over. **This is why we need you in our corner now more than ever. **
With margins this close, we need to do absolutely everything in our power to make sure the vote count is fair and transparent so that YOUR voice is heard. _**[Will you help us defend Claudia’s lead by chipping in here?](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=b9656b4f85074abcb29504afc22ccee4&_e=4BLR-Ir8lRr5Cl-XQRe5JsqwMnCKZIZ3QRm18_0TXRJc37FspNTclkmNJeSc8QjMghp6SF0u_GTwLCTlBTcAccLW3PLSorxNpzZ-RJ3ZxgCkgmuzMqdiAPR_FQ8_hJUg0I1Q0nV0xR6h3OmIpNg6s6tZJJEVbxMDp5U7F5zpgrZkXXYB6j_F5agyyIMLt214Nz9FkSkTZHqbQh5HJVJJbQYSi8MV3YdcrjzF2UguXCmugpPEaXNf99Pd2t8v0c9JmDFztpsqsl2j8ieQOXY3KyD2vRS2wfrE5m4FbmHTfLfDrtvhk3U0mRm0CxZ1inEvV2JRgcvjktYB_dvo5y4jmBMF6d8Ia5aaZaoniucKOOKOtm_yJ9ZzA6KeSgM6lgtHyaNDj0M6TmNFl_jx1XluU6SaFm7DO5gauPCET_4a51a-4MqEZFrTOhjwHsnj0hYYXVAmIfSnhPrzJlPK1MGU5BR6g9gT7tCdgluNetYMeXE%3D)**_ [**CHIP IN TO DEFEND CLAUDIA'S 12 VOTE LEAD**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=b9656b4f85074abcb29504afc22ccee4&_e=4BLR-Ir8lRr5Cl-XQRe5JsqwMnCKZIZ3QRm18_0TXRJc37FspNTclkmNJeSc8QjMghp6SF0u_GTwLCTlBTcAccLW3PLSorxNpzZ-RJ3ZxgCkgmuzMqdiAPR_FQ8_hJUg0I1Q0nV0xR6h3OmIpNg6s6tZJJEVbxMDp5U7F5zpgrZkXXYB6j_F5agyyIMLt214Nz9FkSkTZHqbQh5HJVJJbQYSi8MV3YdcrjzF2UguXCmugpPEaXNf99Pd2t8v0c9JmDFztpsqsl2j8ieQOXY3K6t-h_Ci0zZ-n5YP7eS2c-s7ymv-TMvc78OrEzLhHiOxf2fKIDA0UssWarKPtQK-qHL0yFXgWCDdmicWUAndv2tBf9yLENPdKpnPrLd-3vH1BzFDsyo2km9Xt6VOpmYHBxCUN5qcocbIBPTWPYekeq56o2IMa713fQnCkGEJbrrDIt8bUtZ84iQWRJq1JfN3Jrka3NlqWPF46QncTfyvEL8%3D) Thank you, Team Claudia **\- - - Forwarded Message Below - - -** From: Claudia Tenney Subject: 12 votes. That's it. To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=b9656b4f85074abcb29504afc22ccee4&_e=4BLR-Ir8lRr5Cl-XQRe5JsqwMnCKZIZ3QRm18_0TXRJc37FspNTclkmNJeSc8QjMghp6SF0u_GTwLCTlBTcAccLW3PLSorxNpzZ-RJ3ZxgCkgmuzMqdiAPR_FQ8_hJUg0I1Q0nV0xR6h3OmIpNg6s6tZJJEVbxMDp5U7F5zpgrZkXXYB6j_F5agyyIMLt214Nz9FkSkTZHqbQh5HJVJJbQYSi8MV3YdcrjzF2UguXCmugpPEaXNf99Pd2t8v0c9JmDFztpsqsl2j8ieQOXY3K_f_Qsyy_H-ku6FYIXZyu1GSzyMtT3qH7Q-yZH63OheSt3L3479noSxerdxHSUbBH3jfQL1GeR9o5uLcqEonxQ8WIQp4n9Hp9BLPX16iUCicQDuxtq_bV7ESuPSC4hwDSjwpCB_NpWKWu_5PNBb8Smy5oyw7H4fKnLm5MBuohaYiTgxSSZonaO_kPiVPeGWsC8CZuBZqfqKME6X3cEwK_G0%3D)** Friend, Election Day is almost a full month behind us –– but we still have plenty of work ahead of us if we’re going to protect our razor-thin **12 vote** lead against Anthony Brindisi. **We can’t sit on the sidelines with the stakes this high and the margins this narrow.** Hundreds of ballots are being reviewed and our lead is being challenged in court at this very moment and that’s why I need your help now more than ever to **[defend the integrity of this election outcome.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=b9656b4f85074abcb29504afc22ccee4&_e=4BLR-Ir8lRr5Cl-XQRe5JsqwMnCKZIZ3QRm18_0TXRJc37FspNTclkmNJeSc8QjMghp6SF0u_GTwLCTlBTcAccLW3PLSorxNpzZ-RJ3ZxgCkgmuzMqdiAPR_FQ8_hJUg0I1Q0nV0xR6h3OmIpNg6s6tZJJEVbxMDp5U7F5zpgrZkXXYB6j_F5agyyIMLt214Nz9FkSkTZHqbQh5HJVJJbQYSi8MV3YdcrjzF2UguXCmugpPEaXNf99Pd2t8v0c9JmDFztpsqsl2j8ieQOXY3K_3F9gYH0owZCG7D1H6nl-NrD8zBqCPiyAsxzIWMDRVjOc9mKIq4V4u33nrTkPPnMysOat4CPjdrNiPrezLuDrROVakuCYsT7j0jhVCVPQQIzmCflxEAa8JwCO5JPcNf8nZgs8j1ZKR8hPYKgf8lo5WcZW5c_rP7Y3JSbuRtUG7BrH-Zm6nRNvX8MgfmgU2rVNCxiC94P3JwvxcK-AJ3v14%3D)** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=b9656b4f85074abcb29504afc22ccee4&_e=4BLR-Ir8lRr5Cl-XQRe5JsqwMnCKZIZ3QRm18_0TXRJc37FspNTclkmNJeSc8QjMghp6SF0u_GTwLCTlBTcAccLW3PLSorxNpzZ-RJ3ZxgCkgmuzMqdiAPR_FQ8_hJUg0I1Q0nV0xR6h3OmIpNg6s6tZJJEVbxMDp5U7F5zpgrZkXXYB6j_F5agyyIMLt214Nz9FkSkTZHqbQh5HJVJJbQYSi8MV3YdcrjzF2UguXCmugpPEaXNf99Pd2t8v0c9JmDFztpsqsl2j8ieQOXY3K9B5TCSKrXJinuS2v3fKHcViOSjgbQrWQAa9anPveVWppIqlO9_K7oOEDuRGJaTBZO_f47ij2k9XSPDtx2vfrdQ4ei5PjWp8n2Nps5pRNPqeL9VuERj8ozvIgzm5g4JdWDcVgcrvDppbqFF11stVdErKiOlPY-Jhd-IqCgJL3CryXl1M3zwwGatGH5m6zI4AVUCuoyluoKEeJ3_PCc2knCA%3D) Friend, millions of Americans are hanging on the edge of their seats waiting to see how this election will end because they know that this race for NY-22 doesn’t just affect Upstate New Yorkers. By flipping this seat from blue to red Republicans everywhere will have a better chance at stopping the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, defunding the police, and every other radical idea on the Left’s wish list. **That’s why we’re calling on our grassroots team to step up and help us protect our lead before it’s too late._[Can I count on you to help us finish the clean_body: with 55 uncounted ballots being added into the mix and our lead being contested in court, this fight is far from over Friend, Have you heard the latest breaking news on our fight to take back NY-22? The official count still shows Claudia with a 12 vote lead –– but a county in NY-22 just found 55 uncounted ballots (11 of which were submitted by non-registered voters)- a MONTH after Election Day! This fight is far from over. This is why we need you in our corner now more than ever. With margins this close, we need to do absolutely everything in our power to make sure the vote count is fair and transparent so that YOUR voice is heard. Thank you, Team Claudia \- - - Forwarded Message Below - - - From: Claudia Tenney Subject: 12 votes. That's it. To: Friend, Election Day is almost a full month behind us –– but we still have plenty of work ahead of us if we’re going to protect our razor-thin 12 vote lead against Anthony Brindisi. We can’t sit on the sidelines with the stakes this high and the margins this narrow. Hundreds of ballots are being reviewed and our lead is being challenged in court at this very moment and that’s why I need your help now more than ever to Friend, millions of Americans are hanging on the edge of their seats waiting to see how this election will end because they know that this race for NY-22 doesn’t just affect Upstate New Yorkers. By flipping this seat from blue to red Republicans everywhere will have a better chance at stopping the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, defunding the police, and every other radical idea on the Left’s wish list. That’s why we’re calling on our grassroots team to step up and help us protect our lead before it’s too late. name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: STATEMENT FROM SENATOR KELLY LOEFFLER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, DECEMBER 4, 2020 STATEMENT FROM SENATOR KELLY LOEFFLER
ATLANTA - Today, Senator Kelly Loeffler issued the following statement:
"It is with an extremely heavy heart that we mourn the loss of Harrison Deal. My heart aches for his family, and Jeff and I will continue to surround them in love and prayer in the days ahead. Harrison was a beloved member of our campaign team. More importantly, Harrison was a smart, bright, loving, loyal and outstanding young man. Harrison embodied the very best of this campaign - and the very best of our state. We will forever cherish and honor Harrison's memory, and I ask every Georgian to join us in praying for his family during this difficult time."
---
| ###
Stephen Lawson Communications Director [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GXEE0O-zINTfxJrnsrmqPF-n4xW6v7MOXkZAltd3lAKn4IPqvLABu_2uiGXI6gtT0PJ7ACoYDiDUj3GcUTzZYKMurQ2pcGQUZffm3dBPd7bY9nKGkKJ613oEZOUl11ivq80eqWAkgCnaearH8P-5EfV9Kq8Xybr0&c=-ZfB6Tt4qaVIWhfU-9xq2Tg1mjrcxDTtCp7TAYCZvkc59c2ewlYOpA==&ch=QZRULPuGgIIFO_aDRCnneQulSmz6YkV9_peij5bM4TdcRwAGF5gy4Q==)

subject: President Trump is Coming to Georgia This Weekend!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a2716aaceb3c/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-66575?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| _**President Trump is Coming to Georgia This Weekend!**_
---
| Folks -

This is a BIG weekend for Team Perdue and Team Loeffler! We’re so excited to welcome President Donald Trump and Vice President Pence.

**There are still spots available for President Trump’s visit - RSVP TODAY!**
Saturday, December 5, 2020
Doors open at 3:00 PM EST
Event starts at 7:00 PM EST
Valdosta Regional Airport
2626 Madison Highway
Valdosta, GA 31601
---
| [GET TICKETS](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=be27f04552&e=02cd889ad3 "GET TICKETS")
---
| **We are SO excited to have President Trump in Valdosta tomorrow. Help us give him a warm welcome.**
Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=5b4140c0a0&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook.
Click [HERE](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=2cd62a3230&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet.

_**Facebook is banning us from advertising, so we need your help to get the word out.** _

**Last night, Senator Perdue joined Laura Ingraham for her Atlanta special!**

PERDUE: _"The Vice President is coming tomorrow. The President is coming down to Valdosta - the southern part of our state - on Saturday. It's actually where he started - one of his first rallies when he was a candidate. He's excited about coming down. He's going to deliver this message: we've got to protect what we did for four years under this administration. If in fact the result is not in his favor, we've got to protect it, and the way to do that is to get Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue re-elected."_

Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=61b60b33ff&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch.
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=cc509e5075&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **Laura knows what’s at stake - and she laid it out last night live in Atlanta. **
** **
INGRAHAM: _“If you’re upset or if you’re angry about what has happened in this state, there is only one right way to channel your frustration: by working to ensure that Loeffler and Perdue win on January 5.

“Some severely misguided lawyers are actually urging Republicans - I can’t believe I’m even hearing this - NOT to vote in the runoff.

“While I agree that all claims should be fully and legally pursued, how does simply turning the keys over to the Democrats solve anything?”
_
**Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=cec0ad2b19&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch.**
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=0a6f8f1408&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **This morning, Senator Perdue joined Hugh Hewitt to discuss what’s at stake in the Georgia runoffs.**

Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=784e5e5142&e=02cd889ad3) to listen.

_**Our message is simple: Win Georgia. Save America. Please, chip in[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=1f17a34cfe&e=02cd889ad3).**_

---
| _**In The News**_
---
| **NEWT GINGRICH → **
_“Ossoff's first run-off fundraiser focused on raising money in San Francisco, specifically—and California, in general. His ideology is closer to Kamala Harris, Nancy Pelosi, and other California liberals than it is to Georgia citizens. You see this in his endorsement of Bernie Sanders' views and his defense of Raphael Warnock's radicalism. Already, he and Warnock have raised 80 percent of their run-off campaign money from places like California and New York, rather than Georgia. So his political loyalties naturally follow the money of Californians and New Yorkers—not the votes of Georgians.”_
Read the rest of former Speaker Gingrich’s op-ed in [Newsweek](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=4037edfe1d&e=02cd889ad3).

**RICK SCOTT →**
_"We all know, and I think even Democrats realize, this is for the whole enchilada... The Democrats want socialism. They want to pack the Supreme Court. They want to infringe on First Amendment rights, Second Amendment rights. They want to ruin the health care system through eliminating private health care for 150 million Americans ... This is what this election's about, these two races down in Georgia."_
Watch Senator Scott on Bill Hemmer Reports [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c1d6954b5a&e=02cd889ad3).

**BUDDY CARTER →**
_"The road to socialism will never run through the state of Georgia. That's just not going to happen. We're not going to allow that to happen. We're inspired. We're inspired as a party. We're inspired as a state that we are going to see the balance of power delivered in the United States Senate and therefore in the United States government. And it will be delivered by two Republican Senators from the state of Georgia."_
Listen to Rep. Carter on Fox Across America [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=68801d397a&e=02cd889ad3).

**MARSHA BLACKBURN →**
_“Look at Chuck Schumer’s remarks. He didn’t say we’re going to go win Georgia, we’re going to fight for every vote. He said, ‘First we take Georgia.’ How disrespectful of Georgia voters. ‘First, we take Georgia then we change America.’ And that socialist agenda should scare people. I mean, he’s talking about defunding the police, statehood for D.C., packing the court, taking away your health insurance, implementing the Green New Deal, repealing the Trump tax cuts, and they say that is their first 100-day agenda if they’re in charge of everything.”_
Watch Senator Blackburn on Mornings with Maria [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=3c99c012ff&e=02cd889ad3).
**###**

The President is coming down to Valdosta - the southern part of our state - on Saturday. It's actually where he started - one of his first rallies when he was a candidate. He's excited about coming down. He's going to deliver this message: we've got to protect what we did for four years under this administration. If in fact the result is not in his favor, we've got to protect it, and the way to do that is to get Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue re-elected." Click or below to watch. | | Laura knows what’s at stake - and she laid it out last night live in Atlanta. INGRAHAM: “If you’re upset or if you’re angry about what has happened in this state, there is only one right way to channel your frustration: by working to ensure that Loeffler and Perdue win on January 5. “Some severely misguided lawyers are actually urging Republicans - I can’t believe I’m even hearing this - NOT to vote in the runoff. “While I agree that all claims should be fully and legally pursued, how does simply turning the keys over to the Democrats solve anything?” Click or below to watch. | | This morning, Senator Perdue joined Hugh Hewitt to discuss what’s at stake in the Georgia runoffs. Click to listen. Our message is simple: Win Georgia. Save America. Please, chip in. | In The News | NEWT GINGRICH → “Ossoff's first run-off fundraiser focused on raising money in San Francisco, specifically—and California, in general. His ideology is closer to Kamala Harris, Nancy Pelosi, and other California liberals than it is to Georgia citizens. You see this in his endorsement of Bernie Sanders' views and his defense of Raphael Warnock's radicalism. Already, he and Warnock have raised 80 percent of their run-off campaign money from places like California and New York, rather than Georgia. So his political loyalties naturally follow the money of Californians and New Yorkers—not the votes of Georgians.” Read the rest of former Speaker Gingrich’s op-ed in . RICK SCOTT → "We all know, and I think even Democrats realize, this is for the whole enchilada... The Democrats want socialism. They want to pack the Supreme Court. They want to infringe on First Amendment rights, Second Amendment rights. They want to ruin the health care system through eliminating private health care for 150 million Americans ... This is what this election's about, these two races down in Georgia." Watch Senator Scott on Bill Hemmer Reports . BUDDY CARTER → "The road to socialism will never run through the state of Georgia. That's just not going to happen. We're not going to allow that to happen. We're inspired. We're inspired as a party. We're inspired as a state that we are going to see the balance of power delivered in the United States Senate and therefore in the United States government. And it will be delivered by two Republican Senators from the state of Georgia." Listen to Rep. Carter on Fox Across America . MARSHA BLACKBURN → “Look at Chuck Schumer’s remarks. He didn’t say we’re going to go win Georgia, we’re going to fight for every vote. He said, ‘First we take Georgia.’ How disrespectful of Georgia voters. ‘First, we take Georgia then we change America.’ And that socialist agenda should scare people. I mean, he’s talking about defunding the police, statehood for D.C., packing the court, taking away your health insurance, implementing the Green New Deal, repealing the Trump tax cuts, and they say that is their first 100-day agenda if they’re in charge of everything.” Watch Senator Blackburn on Mornings with Maria . | "DONATE NOW!" | "VOLUNTEER" | | Join us at PerdueSenate.com and make this the largest grassroots effort in Georgia history to re-elect Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © Perdue For Senate, All rights reserved. Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

subject: Following Indiana's lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Here at home, Indiana Republicans won big last month. We were first on the board for President Trump and Vice President Pence. We earned the largest

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/were-doing-this-together-470050?e=1acd9bb3d6)
Following Indiana's Lead

Here at home, Indiana Republicans won big last month.

We were first on the board for President Trump and Vice President Pence. We earned the largest vote total EVER in a governor's race for Governor Holcomb. We cleared the board for Attorney General-elect Todd Roktia and Congresswoman-elect Victoria Spartz. We reelected our entire Republican congressional delegation. We expanded our supermajority in the Indiana House, we had historic wins at the county level, and so, so much more.

But as you might have seen in a few emails from us this week, it’s more important than ever to make sure that Republicans also maintain control of the U.S. Senate. The direction of our nation – and definitely Indiana’s, too – depend upon it.

And that's why as Indiana Republicans, we're proud to be supporting Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler in the runoff election in Georgia in January.

It's critical that Georgia follows Indiana's lead in electing principled, hardworking conservatives to Congress to fight the liberal machine and their radical agenda. Here are two ways Hoosiers can help the cause in Georgia:
* Donating. It's easy, and you can do it online. Support Kelly Loeffler (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-loeffler-support-120120?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) and Support David Perdue (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-perdue-support-120120?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) by clicking on their hyperlinks.
* Volunteering. Can you head down to Georgia for a weekend or two to safety help get the word out? Get more information by signing up here. (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1KNI53qbU7z18ox0CD9siXfckxNdrbWoA_lyHQs-0l0U/viewform?edit_requested=true&mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Thank you for all of your work here in Indiana this year. Now, let’s all work to make sure that nationally we maintain the Senate, too!

-Kyle Hupfer

PHOTO: Attorney General-elect Todd Rokita announced his transition team this week (more information on that below). I enjoyed looking back at this photo from earlier this summer, when Todd signed the paperwork after the convention vote to officially become our party’s nominee for attorney general.
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

COVID-19 Update

On Wednesday, Governor Holcomb provided an update on our state's fight against the coronavirus (https://www.facebook.com/watch/live/?v=3683076825086816&ref=watch_permalink&mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) . With colder weather arriving and the holiday season beginning, it is more important than ever to practice safe social distancing to keep our fellow Hoosiers safe. That also means wearing a mask and making sure you wash your hands to help prevent the spread of the coronavirus. To watch Governor Holcomb's full update, click here (https://www.facebook.com/watch/live/?v=3683076825086816&ref=watch_permalink&mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

To view the updated county-by-county, color coded map (https://www.coronavirus.in.gov/2393.htm?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) of COVID-19 cases in Indiana, click here (https://www.coronavirus.in.gov/2393.htm?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) . Currently Indiana has 16 counties in red, one in yellow and the rest in orange.

The CDC has also released new quarantine guidelines (https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/if-you-are-sick/quarantine.html?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) for those who have been exposed to COVID-19, including options and procedures for shorter quarantines. To view those guidelines, click here (https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/if-you-are-sick/quarantine.html?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

As many Hoosiers know, we have around 800 members of the Indiana National Guard deployed throughout the state assisting at long term care facilities. Tune in at around the 18:50 mark in the governor's update (https://www.facebook.com/watch/live/?v=3683076825086816&ref=watch_permalink&mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) for a great conversation with a a staff sergeant in the Indiana National Guard and nurse who is currently helping out at a long term care facility in Southern Indiana. You won't want to miss this conversation. To watch the update, click here (https://www.facebook.com/watch/live/?v=3683076825086816&ref=watch_permalink&mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

Together, we can continue to fight the spread of COVID-19 in our state and enjoy a safe holiday season.

To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , Twitter (https://twitter.com/holcombforin?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) and Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/holcombforin/?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

Global Business Picks Indiana for Global
Headquarters, Long-Term Growth

Big news today! The world's second-largest independent animal health company in the world, Elanco Animal Health, announced that it has selected Indiana - out of a world of options - as its global headquarters following its acquisition of Bayer Animal Health in 2018.

This means Elanco will be retaining 1,600 Hoosier workers across its corporate and manufacturing operations statewide - including in Clinton, Indianapolis and Terre Haute. In addition, Elanco will create about 575 new, highly-skilled, high-wage jobs to support its global headquarters and R&D activity.

The new global headquarters will invest more than $300 million into 45 acres of the former GM stamping plant industrial site on Indianapolis' near westside, which has sat vacant since 2011. This will transform the site into a walkable, mixed-use space that expands the boundaries of downtown Indianapolis across the White River and expands White River State Park.

"It is a momentous day for the state of Indiana as we celebrate Elanco’s decision to establish its global headquarters in central Indiana, positioning itself for future growth and consolidation in the Hoosier state and creating hundreds of high-paying jobs for Hoosiers," said Governor Eric Holcomb.

--> Click here to read more about this big news for Indiana <-- (https://calendar.in.gov/site/iedc/event/iedc-elanco-picks-indiana-for-global-headquarters-long-term-growth-and-innovation/?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Attorney General-Elect Rokita Announces Transition Team

Indiana Attorney General-elect Todd Rokita has assembled a great group of legal professionals and public servants to lead his transition team as he prepares to become our next attorney general in January.

"I am overwhelmed by the outpouring of support for our campaign, and I again want to thank my fellow Hoosiers for the trust and confidence placed in me to serve as your next Attorney General,” Rokita said.

Todd Rokita has named veteran attorney Brent C. Embrey as chairman of the transition team and former IU Health President and CEO Daniel F. Evans, Jr. as chairman of the team’s executive committee. If you're interested in joining the Attorney General's office, email your resume to the transition team at info@toddrokita.com (mailto:info@toddrokita.com) .

--> Click here to read more about Todd Rokita's transition team <-- (https://toddrokita2020.com/2020/11/30/attorney-general-elect-todd-rokita-announces-transition-team-with-strong-experience-in-the-office/?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Happy Birthday, Henry!

Last week, Indiana’s First Dog, Henry Holcomb, celebrated a milestone birthday – he’s now 10 years old!

And of course, Henry was pretty pupular on his birthday, receiving a greeting from other dogs and their humans across the state. Check out those happy birthday wishes here (https://twitter.com/FirstDogHenry/status/1331238969573593090?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and read this story that ran last Friday on the front page of the Times of Northwest Indiana (https://www.nwitimes.com/news/local/govt-and-politics/henry-holcomb-indianas-first-dog-celebrates-10th-birthday/article_3b991f99-4d42-5d20-8faf-2850b420b967.html?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

News You Can Use

Governor Eric Holcomb appoints several to state boards and commissions (https://www.insideindianabusiness.com/story/42993976/holcomb-makes-commission-board-appointments?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch discusses 2020 with WLBC's Steve Lindell (https://www.facebook.com/LGSuzanneCrouch/posts/3645756425444587?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Senator Todd Young m (https://www.young.senate.gov/newsroom/press-releases/young-perdue-durbin-coons-to-introduce-bipartisan-bill-addressing-shortage-of-doctors-nurses?fbclid=IwAR09ksBF6vtxjMyJn5BTwAFFvx-aaP83pd5eX9lQ1Tq1FklabMFSsqvrHRY&mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) eets with Executive Director of the U.N. World Food Programme (https://www.facebook.com/SenatorToddYoung/posts/5334527143239373?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Senator Mike Braun c (http://www.winchesternewsgazette.com/news/senator-braun-meets-with-community-leaders-at-wick-s-pies-in-randolph-county/article_28d33caa-2f51-11eb-a9a8-0b7ec870a1ac.html?fbclid=IwAR1Etq-VhQbbIxJCloHPWtl2TeaUjDvLVi4FOa0A2b17_O6dVzDayYHPWi0&mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) alls for election integrity, not overturning election results (https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/op-eds/sen-mike-braun-its-about-election-integrity-not-overturning-a-result?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congresswoman Jackie Walorski believes vaccines bring a glimpse of normalcy (https://www.facebook.com/jackiewalorski/posts/10159105693056202?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) for Americans (https://www.facebook.com/jackiewalorski/posts/10159105693056202?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Jim Banks shares his thoughts on the conservative movement’s future (https://www.aei.org/events/chairman-mike-johnson-r-la-and-chairman-elect-jim-banks-r-in-on-the-republican-study-committee-in-the-117th-congress/?fbclid=IwAR0tq39sJmgYTJvRMJXHIoB-dmnViqLhj0BUJjq6Jnz0-rAkGjWXYn2y054&mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Jim Baird highlights communities continuing to help spread Christmas cheer (https://www.facebook.com/RepJimBaird/posts/722035688429706?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congresswoman Susan Brooks thanks our essential workers this Christmas season (https://www.facebook.com/CongresswomanSusanWBrooks/posts/3630690353644511?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Greg Pence congratulates the Batesville FFA team for winning Indiana 4-H title (https://www.facebook.com/RepGregPence/posts/1601536303512003?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Larry Bucshon applauds Rep. McMorris Rodgers (https://bucshon.house.gov/news/documentsingle.aspx?DocumentID=4031&fbclid=IwAR13vE0GJ3XJhSTgDmV_xXcUp5csV-xFbICwEvVv-9P2PvMsN017v2rk54A&mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) for selection to E&C Committee (https://bucshon.house.gov/news/documentsingle.aspx?DocumentID=4032&fbclid=IwAR0N0OumVBh3DxPRFQiooqtN5wIAs-qCFNSr9aHIPxMJS-HM-9pKcSRNK30&mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Trey Hollingsworth invited as guest for Bloomington Chamber Q & A session (http://www.wbiw.com/2020/11/24/bloomington-chamber-to-host-rep-trey-hollingsworth/?mc_cid=4418ec84b0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Vaccine planning
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Earlier this week, Rhode Island began our two-week "pause," and I want to say thank you. This isn't easy, but the data we've seen shows that, so far, people are taking the pause seriously and staying home as much as possible. Please, continue to limit your mobility, and encourage your friends and family to do the same.
There has been a lot of good news on the COVID-19 vaccine front over the last few weeks. Both the Pfizer and Moderna vaccines are awaiting FDA approval with about 95% effectiveness. Soon, both vaccines will be fully evaluated by the FDA and our panel of experts here in Rhode Island. We have been planning for this for months. When we have a vaccine that the doctors, researchers, and scientists tell us is safe, we'll be ready to distribute it as quickly as is safely possible. To hear more about our vaccine planning, please watch the quick [eight-minute video](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h-qQIqlgBLUgi8QiQNBzJ8lcd4WY0nT8Eetvp0WuIJqAqd1DDNVpGpZlPCQVAZAgDKjwuSxAeZWQJJJ7BnuBX6CNg05LLiCuurAsRNmy_THWTD8Ujd2JhG5ftXETWp0YCdn5CiAMEwU-7gHzUc0Mm4iWlGYAea69fwZrlRNTfjo=&c=Kyh_tRNc5GZuBVfi-6zKLN-DR83m86fI6l5SpjSd0k68pYL_Udio6g==&ch=KZKngCeOMoLxu_I2BpinpmBjvraTyIjOppIW8xaeneR9opCOY6nArA==) by clicking on the image below.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h-qQIqlgBLUgi8QiQNBzJ8lcd4WY0nT8Eetvp0WuIJqAqd1DDNVpGpZlPCQVAZAgDKjwuSxAeZWQJJJ7BnuBX6CNg05LLiCuurAsRNmy_THWTD8Ujd2JhG5ftXETWp0YCdn5CiAMEwU-7gHzUc0Mm4iWlGYAea69fwZrlRNTfjo=&c=Kyh_tRNc5GZuBVfi-6zKLN-DR83m86fI6l5SpjSd0k68pYL_Udio6g==&ch=KZKngCeOMoLxu_I2BpinpmBjvraTyIjOppIW8xaeneR9opCOY6nArA==)
---
| You can watch the full video of the press conference [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h-qQIqlgBLUgi8QiQNBzJ8lcd4WY0nT8Eetvp0WuIJqAqd1DDNVpGpZlPCQVAZAg04IxEpVSTfU1IBZJIrNeLFouxx4Z_n3MgHVMN7xm4Hba3tlIOyb0XwO01vumcwulwjUnZtdqy3M73gl9IwtQi4v06NNFkeaw66fHiR5ZLz5TLPyTYwtd171rWE0ZLSARfdsCQC-wM08=&c=Kyh_tRNc5GZuBVfi-6zKLN-DR83m86fI6l5SpjSd0k68pYL_Udio6g==&ch=KZKngCeOMoLxu_I2BpinpmBjvraTyIjOppIW8xaeneR9opCOY6nArA==).
---
| Right now, we're planning for every scenario and developing different distribution models based on the allocations of vaccine that we expect to come to Rhode Island. We're already working with hospitals and other health care providers to ensure they have the supplies and personnel to receive, store, handle, and administer both versions of the vaccine.
We know that initial supplies of vaccine will be very limited, but that it will be coming soon. From our planning conversations with our federal partners and the manufacturers, it's looking like we could receive roughly 10,000 doses of the Pfizer vaccine as early as the middle of this month, and 19,000 doses from Moderna about a week after that. That's not going to flip the switch on COVID-19 in Rhode Island -- in a state of 1 million people, 29,000 doses will only go so far, particularly when you consider that every person needs two doses before they're fully vaccinated. But we are ready to hit the ground running and distribute these vaccines as quickly and safely as possible to our health care providers. You can see our draft blueprint for distributing the vaccine [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h-qQIqlgBLUgi8QiQNBzJ8lcd4WY0nT8Eetvp0WuIJqAqd1DDNVpGpZlPCQVAZAguwDfHxaJJ9ttyOXNZG64bhi2thcFjSDxUgUaPn8T8UNqtLouwYJoWxCyd7PZKdkaDvFDena0si1bsvPK1Vdmo4pET7hY7jcz_qGvnlqn22C5Z0OeWihWEwAoYr7Bb9xG6RMHUUoXj4XhdmftPWkD8m8cokZech7IqYYretq8zDs=&c=Kyh_tRNc5GZuBVfi-6zKLN-DR83m86fI6l5SpjSd0k68pYL_Udio6g==&ch=KZKngCeOMoLxu_I2BpinpmBjvraTyIjOppIW8xaeneR9opCOY6nArA==), and we are continuing to consult the CDC and Rhode Island experts in developing this plan.
I want to be very clear: the vaccine is going to come into Rhode Island over the course of months, not weeks. And we're all going to need two doses. It's tempting to think that once the vaccine arrives, COVID-19 will be a thing of the past. But that's not how it will work. Masks are still going to be part of our lives well into 2021, we're still going to need social distancing, and we're still going to have to be careful about the number of people we're around. If we stay serious about following the rules now, we can all look forward to a time next year when COVID-19 is in the rear-view mirror.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h-qQIqlgBLUgi8QiQNBzJ8lcd4WY0nT8Eetvp0WuIJqAqd1DDNVpGpZlPCQVAZAgcyGxjFH-kosCBut4QKhzoJw7I3ouZKtQEJXDCppwx7wjodVACkk9IMB3SXGJlSo-vllPdto1wWaU_dhhCbY6eClQ9J4Qwn7tBhpp4ddHsL1cd4F5EbW0m3EfpTQRIIMaKIN-kBilbqV2X6etzlX0NL7vxwUrJ0_WTnIOy96DkYRkg4a0yIEo1DNTn-Aq9WH5M07pcr3XPekQb1_00bwaeJPG_fP8IgBaKWq4B_KbpsvU5DPmLsM8akMSkQcQAnPzAbR3VL6-HhE=&c=Kyh_tRNc5GZuBVfi-6zKLN-DR83m86fI6l5SpjSd0k68pYL_Udio6g==&ch=KZKngCeOMoLxu_I2BpinpmBjvraTyIjOppIW8xaeneR9opCOY6nArA==).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h-qQIqlgBLUgi8QiQNBzJ8lcd4WY0nT8Eetvp0WuIJqAqd1DDNVpGpFyY31I6ilnOqwJsIHxOvAGooBIUys_jGPaknrh_vp6wbPjC_qBuhCdu2AzYxSeNA_AaQWi_9O7VhUvmwyCoj64VJ5sU1kXLMul3f2w6OroDEj8_9bBZsUeT2LGr1FRfgHI51JnLKROyTFSkHU7p6Q=&c=Kyh_tRNc5GZuBVfi-6zKLN-DR83m86fI6l5SpjSd0k68pYL_Udio6g==&ch=KZKngCeOMoLxu_I2BpinpmBjvraTyIjOppIW8xaeneR9opCOY6nArA==)

To hear more about our vaccine planning, please watch the quick == by clicking on the image below. | == | You can watch the full video of the press conference ==. | Right now, we're planning for every scenario and developing different distribution models based on the allocations of vaccine that we expect to come to Rhode Island. We're already working with hospitals and other health care providers to ensure they have the supplies and personnel to receive, store, handle, and administer both versions of the vaccine. We know that initial supplies of vaccine will be very limited, but that it will be coming soon. From our planning conversations with our federal partners and the manufacturers, it's looking like we could receive roughly 10,000 doses of the Pfizer vaccine as early as the middle of this month, and 19,000 doses from Moderna about a week after that. That's not going to flip the switch on COVID-19 in Rhode Island -- in a state of 1 million people, 29,000 doses will only go so far, particularly when you consider that every person needs two doses before they're fully vaccinated. But we are ready to hit the ground running and distribute these vaccines as quickly and safely as possible to our health care providers. You can see our draft blueprint for distributing the vaccine ==, and we are continuing to consult the CDC and Rhode Island experts in developing this plan. I want to be very clear: the vaccine is going to come into Rhode Island over the course of months, not weeks. And we're all going to need two doses. It's tempting to think that once the vaccine arrives, COVID-19 will be a thing of the past. But that's not how it will work. Masks are still going to be part of our lives well into 2021, we're still going to need social distancing, and we're still going to have to be careful about the number of people we're around. If we stay serious about following the rules now, we can all look forward to a time next year when COVID-19 is in the rear-view mirror. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | == | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

Former Speaker of House Newt Gingrich is encouraging Georgia conservatives to ignore the “destructive” rhetoric of attorneys Lin Wood and Sidney Powell ahead of the Jan. 5 Georgia Senate runoffs. **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM5LTAwMGQ4OTVjYjM3YzQyMWJhOTc4YmI0NWEzYjRhZjg4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL2hvdC1taWMtY2F0Y2hlcy10cnVtcHMtcG93ZXJmdWwtNy13b3JkLW1lc3NhZ2UtYnJvdGhlci1mYWxsZW4tY29wLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09dHBwbnRrJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMC0xMS0yNyZtaWQ9NDMwNzMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=nOY1MuUMbmxCHj2AmDT2pQ)** | |

**[Trump Undeterred as Media Seeks To Pit Him Against Barr, Doesn't Back Down from Election Fight](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM5LTAwMGQ4OTVjYjM3YzQyMWJhOTc4YmI0NWEzYjRhZjg4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%&K=Qxa76vLoUytr_QEvUEFC1w)**
A day after giving what he billed as “the most important speech of my life” to [denounce fraud](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM5LTAwMGQ4OTVjYjM3YzQyMWJhOTc4YmI0NWEzYjRhZjg4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2VzdGVybmpvdXJuYWwuY29tL2RvbmFsZC10cnVtcC1hZGRyZXNzZXMtbmF0aW9uLWNhbGxzLWltcG9ydGFudC1zcGVlY2gtZXZlci1tYWRlLz9taWQ9NDMwNzMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=GezmYbmIevDMsgrdMDANTA) in the November election and press his claims to actually have won, President Donald Trump on Thursday took media questions about the battle so far. **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM5LTAwMGQ4OTVjYjM3YzQyMWJhOTc4YmI0NWEzYjRhZjg4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%&K=T6yTnVnw8XBDJsInPCenVA)**

name: Google
subject: Important policy changes for Google Account storage
body:
| New inactive and over quota storage policies
---

---
Dear Google User,
---
We are writing to let you know that we recently announced new storage policies for Google Accounts using [_Gmail_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEz9coRGnvtAKyNqgz-mDgDFDXX9zkfOuzGxFC5EBmRKJy0P7XZr36oWocgStdSZy8bEAy5qPQdyO9BiBM6Oh5oTo1P3pJow76SPs7y5axLhMzQ6w9M), [_Google Drive_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEywSOtDMjo-84GTp33jqmTOmtMwb1CQluaYqPpGwK28vTW-fnGRgV2V0JdVkL82IH9AWUc9rpuFlVJ1DG4H-To6521poJYBGo1KjdcQlXoPbmeCatHQ9xk) (including Google Docs, Sheets, Slides, Drawings, Forms, and Jamboard files) and/or [_Google Photos_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEyjq_2mtynDT1MP9T4DwaXVcPk5NVz-DsNIqmTf4YQReQAGqUdRHty-Nesfv2pOfoDl3tOwbHSCXV4y157Oxh9SRiXVEiQKx58lXPHQ3g0WyH4dyO3ZkzAxL8BP) that bring us in line with industry practices. Since you have previously used one or more of these products in your [_Google Account storage_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEzSFqdmugTnRp7pReZB4cjTtbAuEmjeTrQhp2sIb9YnomjWB-JHyu9sl519s9sY4DR7kcjUcdANvO-86jnImuF1vZJVFpCcoC-PaVnggSzc4J_cR98f-23JjtCX5vtPfTOGvAWcAGUhvzjYsGeqtfhw8T5NXEG5rNPdsHItYgshrRpE), we wanted to tell you about the new policies well before they go into effect on June 1, 2021. Below is a summary of the new policies. Please reference our [_Help Center article_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEz5E5VsAz_kD8eZcMmzj0I_9k9hh1teP7N_bhQ97sc4gtGKmY4coG-6GZlgDgf5SNa6n7BxjNpQceo9Q8MJNBNgYqWy_lcXTBmE3KvMEVH7UiNUSTfR4LaH8ImwzEOLvyY8pmaHt5EobgTTNU4) for a complete list of what's changing. We are writing to let you know that we recently announced new storage policies for Google Accounts using [_Gmail_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEyboFPCNhk--4F4DOFPCCIEUUC85K6hiG4hXpraMXU3oyGvmYqcHxj-x1-MnzIEwEhGBp8RCmwRE1rF0Y4GnBogWGVHF_uwl7kBmFHXxcPrgJ_GxygEQ12t), [_Google Drive_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEySsayVxdDubdLJRdQwhUxNcSSBMpwYjBtrtqdPOMCEK76-nm5IYuk508ijl3L-zc2yzmuj8sGSwTLtbAi3HakRaueRxAmzGok7gH8r-SEn4ieYkb3du5b2K7MR) (including Google Docs, Sheets, Slides, Drawings, Forms, and Jamboard files) and/or [_Google Photos_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEzv_ULasKNy1ZsxuImhAdxZxVMk39x3vG0K6y1RkuWjXdp_U4p5NQmRukOXhywijxCRo3TGlmvmcz3ZD-4tgr4UnFFJXYWrOElm7pyIf4_Z1957ouEJCOVpznL0Ah6hJw) that bring us in line with industry practices. Since you have previously used one or more of these products in your [_Google Account storage_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEzGgpqLRWoHALfzmMITA_iN9QAoeJW60_DwRxJejNQT6648maqHhhWphFuq84OAE_fCznUFL6s0Zb429hT5JU3iNmVMUaZIOqNwyoLf0ksVgpRjW68yq9Loy1WFuTRqHkjd1XKJMiboNUw4rvwNPihy1QgkaR9QZwQCxtncuei9F6FOV3AS0w), we wanted to tell you about the new policies well before they go into effect on June 1, 2021. Below is a summary of the new policies. Please reference our [_Help Center article_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEyVYRHY-Ei9eWe8x7YAe1C1Ngofss_0vkuXZTK_Ah52SgF1_S4xO64nu6b-porAEx2if6FQWxyr8pSSOMR9FFeSoTCG6-Yoz8wKVYs1eHpf6BQTV20xI1gfotqijZsleklAShHSM__vgQ5gLKEaR3OF) for a complete list of what's changing.
---
Summary of the new policies (effective June 1, 2021):
---
| **•** | If you're [_inactive_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnExhbrZiuY7PN4C_MDI1jbg5dxVzrqvdcIV2URv26IqAG7Ld8nkSnkWXv5H_5ZTuIltAzy_OzSebQ_Q_ZppQUB0Uh0XbnWWaMH7_I2bdcYs37Ug64FGF_oi4M3X3KbKd-RmsW0fby8kybXWd) for 2 years (24 months) in Gmail, Drive or Photos, we may delete the content in the product(s) in which you're inactive. [_Google One_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnExroM7fNEMM2yyWyBBK_AbMMGWkkbvbXuYBEO55ewGIpTrkIbauYm7n7EU8EHdPlZ1smbFR0E0Yp5d33xHIdWgsdZNbfrk89KS3YXDo1eYByg7pYXwYu1FoS21wnuwT-MtTL-Fa-dhNuxl2WZXt5774G1DWHZHx) members who are within their storage quota and in [_good-standing_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnExSq9uES8h2wcpa5dG1jIqko21XI7njW77oIMlbSGXrvULSTCH0BcDtsEtIM5jEwHRNlmmg5V9LA9DHe1YxGQgfrizpEz3q-ZOtL-__iQH94JEuxL9a6V4xLI4XKtx9IaWhW5J9eQ) will not be impacted by this new inactive policy. If you're [_inactive_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEziISXFgUgqdkq9I1uyGvJBCScEir60KSFwluUnjuJEmtc0KcXjnWSPVttH3kUjIlxlo5T-I2DJt-cFFbfPmz46tP7TuZuJWDwcX8wTb1IqdcROSvFpVBfHqc_fjIuBNwoKzUZqKQPNgzq1Z5k2tA) for 2 years (24 months) in Gmail, Drive or Photos, we may delete the content in the product(s) in which you're inactive. [_Google One_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEzh0Fp3jSeiF6MXdCMekG6sQ_zW6cXe5iqPW3jNgRizhQaoVYiOrWXB4Mwa1XlXOuHMWWmrWxJuEhXEpc9wf0REtAK7ygKceNswEJgBKH7DcUO1MiyN6B2ObW3ay9CTPi5FwuWrwycd5vhGenoJvHPdRYafqILwfB78Nw) members who are within their storage quota and in [_good-standing_](https://www.google.com/appserve/mkt/p/AD-FnEzRtxCNdKpu72rB2VezGY41w70CACqE4tvnuaWRyfzprRYJq2_NZs2ILbbKC7YR2H9FLmvrWq6QWGy2by7BmHqLOU_I3YKVmYxQnxAISknLT0LtXQuDbLW179I_dq4GKY-hHWZEy6YWJo4) will not be impacted by this new inactive policy.
---|---
| **•** | If you exceed your storage limit for 2 years, we may delete your content across Gmail, Drive and Photos.
---|---
What this means for you:
---
| **•** | You won't be impacted by these changes unless you've been inactive or over your storage limit for 2 years. As this policy goes into effect June 1, 2021, the earliest it would be enforced is June 1, 2023.
---|---
| **•** | After June 1, 2021, if you are either inactive or over your storage limit, we will send you email reminders and notifications in advance and prior to deleting any content.
---|---
| **•** | Even if you are either inactive or over your storage limit for one or more of these services and content is deleted, you will still be able to sign in.
---|---

Join Team Hinson in congratulating these remarkable GOP women! &zwnj
**ALERT: More GOP Women than EVER before in the House; 10 Districts Flipped REPUBLICAN by Conservative Women!**
Friend, When Ashley Hinson first declared she was running, people laughed in her face and told her she wasn't going to win. Still, she persisted because she was determined to bring some much-needed Iowa Common Sense back to Washington! Conservative women challenging Democratic incumbents across the country faced similar situations, but guess what?_**Many of those women pulled out VICTORIES and flipped their districts RED!**_
| District | Winner
---|---
MN-07 | Michelle Fischbach
NM-02 | Yvette Herrell
OK-05 | Stephanie Bice
FL-27 | Maria Elvira Salazar
**IA-01** | **Ashley Hinson**
CA-48 | Michelle Steel
SC-01 | Nancy Mace
CA-39 | Young Kim
NY-11 | Nicole Malliotakis
IA-02 | Mariannette Miller-Meeks

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Hi, Friend,

I'm reaching out to top Republican supporters from the 2020 cycle, including you!

We need to stay the course for Georgia's critical Senate runoff elections in January. Here's the situation:
* Senate Republicans have until **[MIDNIGHT TONIGHT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015-lLsEmITQQsudIabVci0opG6HvoTtJi2iwFwIA9XwfWeHByD85Q83aWjfheykNzeHPE4-1r47RUdu0qOt5vj1HJIiGTukL9sk3LPSNVlpAg2Eu8cxr17ZEzAuZW81YnodncHp9DzhhixX-J0deYzxW-DZOcyz6URz_2w9uw-MTZMFD8O2tYYhWeEQXgoKiUtvFI0ftKjTn3lQggP7oAeXEdlCZxytpwHTp3cxxTLoFLfE2ahIJGej7Ubv3UB8YG7HNp50CZsVGjgC4gjGeYnIVZ63JdIlsDc_dzvkiJP2NBNSMKuo4JGNx2jPi2AEwNZ1GI1mSxyna3ZNK1zfjpJJkL3DKhBnxhTL6rJFZxhZkKynmBIQEZKTmbvPWwYP23TaIxwrKERKE4XuFfeQZLYQ==&c=5ru5HutFYKYjCQAxocJgahxoMzmtLwHMKmXQbfU2QaXTquCnI-7j_g==&ch=cg1uz_k6CMUKMNCrlsMuQceMzsVwchx1Ae7yCpAPYQVlXfYg3HR9AA==)****** to get back on track and finally hit their November fundraising goal
* Republican strategists like myself agree - failure to reach fundraising benchmarks moving forward will put the Senate Majority in _**serious jeopardy**_
* Supporters like YOU are the backbone of the conservative movement. Even [**a small contribution of just $5, $1O, or $3O**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015-lLsEmITQQsudIabVci0opG6HvoTtJi2iwFwIA9XwfWeHByD85Q83aWjfheykNzeHPE4-1r47RUdu0qOt5vj1HJIiGTukL9sk3LPSNVlpAg2Eu8cxr17ZEzAuZW81YnodncHp9DzhhixX-J0deYzxW-DZOcyz6URz_2w9uw-MTZMFD8O2tYYhWeEQXgoKiUtvFI0ftKjTn3lQggP7oAeXEdlCZxytpwHTp3cxxTLoFLfE2ahIJGej7Ubv3UB8YG7HNp50CZsVGjgC4gjGeYnIVZ63JdIlsDc_dzvkiJP2NBNSMKuo4JGNx2jPi2AEwNZ1GI1mSxyna3ZNK1zfjpJJkL3DKhBnxhTL6rJFZxhZkKynmBIQEZKTmbvPWwYP23TaIxwrKERKE4XuFfeQZLYQ==&c=5ru5HutFYKYjCQAxocJgahxoMzmtLwHMKmXQbfU2QaXTquCnI-7j_g==&ch=cg1uz_k6CMUKMNCrlsMuQceMzsVwchx1Ae7yCpAPYQVlXfYg3HR9AA==) can go a long way for the Republican cause, helping us knock on more doors, making more phone calls, and keeping our ads on the air

The Senate Republican Majority has authorized the extension of [**6X-MATCH**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015-lLsEmITQQsudIabVci0opG6HvoTtJi2iwFwIA9XwfWeHByD85Q83aWjfheykNzeHPE4-1r47RUdu0qOt5vj1HJIiGTukL9sk3LPSNVlpAg2Eu8cxr17ZEzAuZW81YnodncHp9DzhhixX-J0deYzxW-DZOcyz6URz_2w9uw-MTZMFD8O2tYYhWeEQXgoKiUtvFI0ftKjTn3lQggP7oAeXEdlCZxytpwHTp3cxxTLoFLfE2ahIJGej7Ubv3UB8YG7HNp50CZsVGjgC4gjGeYnIVZ63JdIlsDc_dzvkiJP2NBNSMKuo4JGNx2jPi2AEwNZ1GI1mSxyna3ZNK1zfjpJJkL3DKhBnxhTL6rJFZxhZkKynmBIQEZKTmbvPWwYP23TaIxwrKERKE4XuFfeQZLYQ==&c=5ru5HutFYKYjCQAxocJgahxoMzmtLwHMKmXQbfU2QaXTquCnI-7j_g==&ch=cg1uz_k6CMUKMNCrlsMuQceMzsVwchx1Ae7yCpAPYQVlXfYg3HR9AA==) help them reach their goal and WIN in Georgia.

body:
I refuse to let Radical Governor Phil Murphy shut down South Jersey AGAIN.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XvHe360ky25Lwd5rVjG6_pbNuMzRBqXvnoCK7ClxO1pHXauPLiuxpOFARc9Gz_49iuvcPoaOy6onVfpApEQej-5b9BqxX3k01unzxNmHPPnAPwmk0W9oSv0fYxdEkXKRJ9NPYzPbLMyhgUPyDuJpBfNoUW5hbGFklwSFyjniNnnhG2PKn3XZRp0IgMAR8ZGvzPrkwUJQW8GlUKgU3O-MLP26FRSwI107Q9I6HPehhN9e9HKatWOQxO3foAoRdAFElOQwkOmDDIDyOgaytI3bjCdwT89IKD_a5KTEbxDXbBEONjh5gRxMRP1ZurwynKIOSD00gF9tQhHKNH-dSVLV_MtrkIsbtMuMcPaDIgai668nFpnghV3xVwni5i70S4_vtS7BeV_S7d8NgtyAsOiSVA==&c=MdFOnBmLN-0kdO_Ue4MLtxTJjDgfNIbwuDdHPwcQYl7IOJoVsXcYWQ==&ch=wDbS0Dhf3ohxHeU6O_B0DVY3bmWIRVcYUju5vupAGyYpx-NwkZ1Acg==)
Friend,
I refuse to let Radical Governor Phil Murphy shut down South Jersey _AGAIN_. Small businesses and religious organizations were forced to shut their doors after Phil Murphy's last shutdown. Should this happen again, we could see even more family owned small businesses close their doors for good.
I refuse to stand idly by while Governor Murphy's reckless actions destroy the lives of thousands of hard-working middle class South Jersey families.
**Friend, will you sign your name next to mine to tell Phil Murphy you are against a second shutdown in New Jersey?**
[_**Keep New Jersey open - tell Governor Murphy NO! >>> **_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XvHe360ky25Lwd5rVjG6_pbNuMzRBqXvnoCK7ClxO1pHXauPLiuxpOFARc9Gz_49iuvcPoaOy6onVfpApEQej-5b9BqxX3k01unzxNmHPPnAPwmk0W9oSv0fYxdEkXKRJ9NPYzPbLMyhgUPyDuJpBfNoUW5hbGFklwSFyjniNnnhG2PKn3XZRp0IgMAR8ZGvzPrkwUJQW8GlUKgU3O-MLP26FRSwI107Q9I6HPehhN9e9HKatWOQxO3foAoRdAFElOQwkOmDDIDyOgaytI3bjCdwT89IKD_a5KTEbxDXbBEONjh5gRxMRP1ZurwynKIOSD00gF9tQhHKNH-dSVLV_MtrkIsbtMuMcPaDIgai668nFpnghV3xVwni5i70S4_vtS7BeV_S7d8NgtyAsOiSVA==&c=MdFOnBmLN-0kdO_Ue4MLtxTJjDgfNIbwuDdHPwcQYl7IOJoVsXcYWQ==&ch=wDbS0Dhf3ohxHeU6O_B0DVY3bmWIRVcYUju5vupAGyYpx-NwkZ1Acg==)
I will do everything in my power to keep New Jersey open and put people back to work. In order to fight back, I need your help. Let's make our voices heard, Friend.
**[**Keep New Jersey OPEN!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XvHe360ky25Lwd5rVjG6_pbNuMzRBqXvnoCK7ClxO1pHXauPLiuxpOFARc9Gz_49iuvcPoaOy6onVfpApEQej-5b9BqxX3k01unzxNmHPPnAPwmk0W9oSv0fYxdEkXKRJ9NPYzPbLMyhgUPyDuJpBfNoUW5hbGFklwSFyjniNnnhG2PKn3XZRp0IgMAR8ZGvzPrkwUJQW8GlUKgU3O-MLP26FRSwI107Q9I6HPehhN9e9HKatWOQxO3foAoRdAFElOQwkOmDDIDyOgaytI3bjCdwT89IKD_a5KTEbxDXbBEONjh5gRxMRP1ZurwynKIOSD00gF9tQhHKNH-dSVLV_MtrkIsbtMuMcPaDIgai668nFpnghV3xVwni5i70S4_vtS7BeV_S7d8NgtyAsOiSVA==&c=MdFOnBmLN-0kdO_Ue4MLtxTJjDgfNIbwuDdHPwcQYl7IOJoVsXcYWQ==&ch=wDbS0Dhf3ohxHeU6O_B0DVY3bmWIRVcYUju5vupAGyYpx-NwkZ1Acg==)**

subject: THREE DAYS till the Georgia voter registration deadline 🍑
body:
Election season isn't over yet: we need your help to flip the Senate. | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | | _Organizing for everyone._
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
## **Election Season Isn't Over Yet! **
We're back with a special edition message about
the **upcoming Senate runoffs in Georgia 🍑**

The voter registration deadline for this election is **December 7**. That means Georgia voters have [**THREE MORE DAYS**](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=3762423556&e=0aad15100c) to register ahead of January's crucial runoffs.

If you're eligible to vote in Georgia (that includes current 17-year-olds who will turn 18 before January 5!), take two minutes to register now. We need your voice in these elections.

---
| [REGISTER TO VOTE IN GEORGIA](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=05b704dfb2&e=0aad15100c "REGISTER TO VOTE IN GEORGIA")
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
## **What You Can Do:**
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=961cde7b19&e=0aad15100c)
---
23,000 young people in Georgia will turn 18 in time to vote in January. [Join Sunrise Movement to call these young voters](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=4cb6630447&e=0aad15100c) and help them register, request absentee ballots, and make their voices heard in the Georgia runoffs.

---
| [PHONE BANK WITH SUNRISE MOVEMENT](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=85e58c59e9&e=0aad15100c "PHONE BANK WITH SUNRISE MOVEMENT")
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
## **Looking to do even more? **

[Check out this list of BIPOC-led grassroots organizations in Georgia](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=6cc3f36e9d&e=0aad15100c). These organizations are seeking donations and volunteers as they continue to break records for voter turnout in the Peach State.

---
| [SUPPORT GRASSROOTS ORGS](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=ee4621d769&e=0aad15100c "SUPPORT GRASSROOTS ORGS")

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Big Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I'm counting on you to be a founding member of my campaign.
Hi there,
Serving Granite Staters as State Senator, Governor, and now U.S. Senator has been the honor of my life. That's why today, I wanted to let you know that I am running for reelection.
As Senator I've worked across party lines to get results on the top priorities of hard-working Granite Staters, introducing more than 50 bipartisan bills on issues like providing tax credits for innovative companies and supporting veterans as they transition back to civilian life. **And, when the Senate was on the verge of repealing the Affordable Care Act, I cast one of the deciding votes to protect it.**
But pundits are already saying I'm one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection this cycle -- not surprising since we only won by 1,017 votes in 2016. That's why I need you with me in this race from day one.
[**Please, rush $3 or whatever you can right now to become a founding member of this campaign. clean_body: I'm counting on you to be a founding member of my campaign. Hi there, Serving Granite Staters as State Senator, Governor, and now U.S. Senator has been the honor of my life. That's why today, I wanted to let you know that I am running for reelection. As Senator I've worked across party lines to get results on the top priorities of hard-working Granite Staters, introducing more than 50 bipartisan bills on issues like providing tax credits for innovative companies and supporting veterans as they transition back to civilian life. And, when the Senate was on the verge of repealing the Affordable Care Act, I cast one of the deciding votes to protect it. But pundits are already saying I'm one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection this cycle -- not surprising since we only won by 1,017 votes in 2016. That's why I need you with me in this race from day one. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" The future is bright, but we have critical work ahead of us to expand access to affordable health care and expand economic opportunities for hard-working families. And, importantly, we must take urgent, comprehensive action to tackle this pandemic and get our economy back on track. I'm committed to that fight, and I humbly ask you to join me. "" With every good wish, Maggie Hassan ""

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
US Hopes to Vaccinate 20m This Year, 100m by End of February; China Is National Security Threat No. 1; Trump Administration Sues Facebook... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6015ab7e56&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**US Hopes to Vaccinate 20m This Year, 100m by End of February**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5ad33f3efe&e=3ee4985eea)
_-New York Post_
“If vaccines from Pfizer and Moderna soon get emergency approval—as expected—20 million of the most vulnerable Americans could get shots by the end of the year,” Lee Brown reports. “Another 30 million could get shots in January and then 50 million in February—possibly even more if other leading vaccine candidates get approved by then, too.”
---
|
---
| [**China Is National Security Threat No. 1**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=759a2663e4&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Wall Street Journal_
“The People’s Republic of China poses the greatest threat to America today, and the greatest threat to democracy and freedom world-wide since World War II,” National Intelligence Director John Ratcliffe writes. “Beijing is preparing for an open-ended period of confrontation with the U.S. Washington should also be prepared.”
---
|
---
| [**Trump Administration Sues Facebook, Alleges Company Discriminated Against U.S. Workers**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ffd930b6e&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Hill_
Following a nearly two-year investigation, the Justice Department believes “Facebook created a separate hiring process for certain temporary immigration status holders, such as H-1B visa holders, and alleges Facebook did not consider U.S. workers for more than 2,600 positions,” Rebecca Klar reports. “Our message to all employers—including those in the technology sector—is clear: you cannot illegally prefer to recruit, consider, or hire temporary visa holders over U.S. workers,” an Assistant Attorney General said.
---
|
---
| [**To Reform Health Insurance, Let Employees Rather Than Bureaucrats Be in Charge**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=acd0c593bb&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Federalist_
“In addition to the lack of portability—when people lose their job, they generally lose their health coverage—employer-provided health insurance also tends to raise health costs,” Christopher Jacobs writes. “Thankfully, regulations put into place by the Trump administration will solve the portability problem, while also working to realign incentives in ways that will make the health-care system more efficient.”
---
|
---
| [**Trump to Award Wrestling Legend Dan Gable the Presidential Medal of Freedom**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=450b5f6a01&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“President Trump will award Olympic gold medalist and college wrestling legend Dan Gable the Presidential Medal of Freedom on Monday,” Ryan Gaydos reports. “The president awards such honors to ‘individuals who have made especially meritorious contributions to the security or national interests of the United States, to world peace, or to cultural or other significant public or private endeavors.’”

**WATCH:**[**President Trump awards Medal of Freedom to Lou Holtz!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f8bed75152&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8d62ac9ff7&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af98e7c7ff&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=3507ef7988)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: We’re not letting Trump off the hook
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANOS MARTON FOR DISTRICT ATTORNEY
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=9ce131937f&e=7758ed002e)
---
| | Dear Peter \-- Let me be clear: Cy Vance - Manhattan’s current District Attorney - has failed to bring Trump and his crime family to justice for far too long. Because Vance let the Trump family off the hook for fraud in an earlier investigation, and then dragged his feet on this current investigation, Trump got the opportunity to run out the clock on the 2020 election. **As your next Manhattan District Attorney, I will always work to take on the corrupt billionaire class that has taken so much from regular, everyday New Yorkers for FAR too long. And even if Trump pardons his family, we will make sure they are held accountable for state crimes. ** [_**Can you chip in now to our campaign to take on Trump? **_](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=024b1d59a8&e=7758ed002e)
---
| [Donate $20.20 >>](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=bb048ab07a&e=7758ed002e "Donate $20.20 >>")

---
| By failing to initially prosecute Harvey Weinstein and Donald Trump when they had the chance, and covering up the sexual assaults of Columbia University doctor Robert Hadden, the current administration has shown that it is unable to act boldly against the rich and the powerful. Instead, the Vance administration has chosen to focus on punishing New York’s most marginalized communities. This injustice must end. **_It’s time that the District Attorney’s office serve_**** _every resident_**** _, not just those at the very top. _** [_**So chip in $5, $20, or whatever you could afford (and only if you could afford) to our grassroots campaign for change.**_](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=fd399dfc1e&e=7758ed002e)

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter \-- Let me be clear: Cy Vance - Manhattan’s current District Attorney - has failed to bring Trump and his crime family to justice for far too long. Because Vance let the Trump family off the hook for fraud in an earlier investigation, and then dragged his feet on this current investigation, Trump got the opportunity to run out the clock on the 2020 election. As your next Manhattan District Attorney, I will always work to take on the corrupt billionaire class that has taken so much from regular, everyday New Yorkers for FAR too long. And even if Trump pardons his family, we will make sure they are held accountable for state crimes. | "Donate $20.20 >>" | "Donate $50 >>" | "Donate $100 >>" | "Donate a custom amount >>" | By failing to initially prosecute Harvey Weinstein and Donald Trump when they had the chance, and covering up the sexual assaults of Columbia University doctor Robert Hadden, the current administration has shown that it is unable to act boldly against the rich and the powerful. Instead, the Vance administration has chosen to focus on punishing New York’s most marginalized communities. This injustice must end. It’s time that the District Attorney’s office serve every resident , not just those at the very top. | "Donate $20.20 >>" | "Donate $50 >>" | "Donate $100 >>" | "Donate a custom amount >>" | Take care, Janos Marton Progressive Democrat for Manhattan District Attorney | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "DONATE NOW TO ELECT JANOS! >>" | | PAID FOR BY JANOS MARTON FOR DISTRICT ATTORNEY Our mailing address is: Janos Marton for Manhattan District Attorney212 E 25th St Apt 12Brooklyn, NY 11226-6211 Want to change how you receive these emails? | | | | Peter, with 2020 coming to an end and folks beginning to settle in for the holidays, we’re gearing up for 2021 and beyond.

Our goal over the next couple of weeks is to get you ready for what’s next, whether you’re running for office, working on a local campaign, or looking to take your grassroots organization to the next level in the new year!

Onward,

–The NDTC Team

PRESIDENT TRUMP ECHOES JUDICIAL WATCH CONCERNS ABOUT DIRTY VOTER ROLLS

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52196&L=21362&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1hX0FnRnVkcTNVSSZmZWF0dXJlPXlvdXR1LmJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMjA0MjMwODAy]

In his forceful and comprehensive address to the nation this week
on widespread election fraud, the president referred to the many dirty
voter rolls across the country. Here’s what he said:

It’s a widely known fact that the voting rolls are packed with
people who are not lawfully eligible to vote, including those who are
deceased, have moved out of their state, and even our non-citizens of
our country.

Beyond this, the records are riddled with errors, wrong addresses,
duplicate entries, and many other issues. This is not disputed. It has
never been disputed. Dozens of counties in the key swing states have
more registered voters on the rolls than they have voting age
citizens, including 67 counties in Michigan. All of this is evidence.

In Wisconsin, the state’s Board of Elections could not confirm the
residency of more than 100,000 people, but repeatedly refused to
remove those names from its voter rolls before the election. They knew
why, nobody else did. I knew why. They were illegal voters. It is a
travesty that in the year 2020, we do not have any means of verifying
the eligibility of those who cast ballots in an election and such an
important election it is, or determining who they are, whether they
live in the state or whether they’re even American citizens. We have
no idea.
